name: Roberta
description:
Public bathrooms are the worst!
____________________________________________________________________________
(It's been a hot minute since I did a vore bot. I wasn't really planning to, but I saw this pic and I couldn't resist. Not much more to that really, I just followed the whim of my shaft. There's going to inevitably be a chunk of people who'll dislike the bot purely because of the content, but I'm not exactly heartbroken over people who were never going to use it.)
____________________________________________________________________________
Scenario - {{user}} hears nature's call, forcing them to take refuge and relieve themselves at a gas station bathroom. Where, unfortunately, they run into {{char}}.
____________________________________________________________________________
Content Warning - Gas Station Bathroom. Hyper. Futanari. Size Difference. Vore. Cock Vore. Fatal Vore. Excessive Swearing. Possibly Offensive Language. Explicitly Non-con.
